Knowledge base

Help Center

Browse support articles, review onboarding tips, and explore the premium workspace flows.

How do I upload a dataset?

Use the data room to upload CSV, XLSX, PDF, JPG, or PNG and trigger an AI analysis.

Read article
How do insights work?

AURA stores the latest analysis result and shows forecast, cohort, heatmap, and decision views inside insights.

Read article
What is included in each plan?

Starter, Pro, and Enterprise unlock different analysis volumes, exports, and support.

Read article
How does team collaboration work?

Invite teammates, manage roles, and use the workspace settings panel to adjust notifications.

Read article
What security controls are available?

Use the settings area to review two-factor, audit log, and session controls.

Read article
How can I simulate a custom domain?

Enterprise includes a placeholder custom domain like yourbrand.aura.ai in settings.

Read article

AURA

Premium business intelligence intelligence for modern operators.
